01-hoehlen.jpg.alt: Bioluminescent cave with glowing plants in the Flight of Passage queue
01-hoehlen.jpg.caption: Station 1 — Pandora's bioluminescent caves. You're immersed before you even see the ride.

02-labor.jpg.alt: The round Pandora Conservation Initiative research lab with samples and field notes
02-labor.jpg.caption: Station 2 — the Pandora Conservation Initiative lab: real field notes, rock samples, activity all around. This is where the clock ticks slowest.

03-avatar-tank.jpg.alt: A Na'vi avatar floating in an amnio tank beside a screen of genetic markers
03-avatar-tank.jpg.caption: Station 3 — the avatar in the amnio tank, visibly breathing. The moment everyone remembers afterwards — peak-end says hi.
